title: common-target-patch
description: Tenant's commercial sweet spot: sectors, geography, deal sizes, allow/block lists. Read by Sourcing Scout (W9) + Diagnostic (W3-4). Per PRODUCT-SPEC §5.3 line 363.

sectors.description: Tenant's target sectors; e.g. ['fintech', 'public-sector-tech', 'climate']. Free-form strings.

geographies.description: ISO-3166-alpha-2 codes or region labels; UK first per master brief §4.

size_bands.description: Headcount bands defining typical client size.

deal_size_band_gbp.description: Bands surface in Diagnostic ICP scoring + Sourcing Scout shortlist filtering.

named_allowlist.description: Explicit firm names always in-scope (overrides sectors/size filters).

named_blocklist.description: Explicit firm names always out-of-scope (overrides other includes).

competitor_blocklist.description: Competing recruitment firms; agents must not contact their candidates.
